description: Compare two ranges of commits to see how they differ — useful for reviewing a force-pushed rebase
tags: see what changed in a rebase
intents: compare what changed between two rebased versions of a branch
see how a force-push rewrote my commits
diff two ranges of commits side by side
review what changed across a rebase
compare an old branch tip with the rebased one
verify a rebase only reordered commits and did not change content
